age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 50 years. Age relaxation for retired persons as per applicable rules and regulations in Central Government.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's Degree in Agriculture or Horticulture with First Division or a minimum of 60% marks (or equivalent Grade Point Average), Minimum 5 years of experience in policy formulation; preparation of SFC/ EFC notes and Cabinet notes; project formulation, execution and implementation; extension/ management of Government schemes, programmes or missions; DPR preparation and consultancy in the horticulture sector/ Agriculture sector
qualification.details: Master's Degree in Agriculture or Horticulture with First Division or a minimum of 60% marks (or equivalent Grade Point Average). Minimum 5 years of experience in policy formulation; preparation of SFC/ EFC notes and Cabinet notes; project formulation, execution and implementation; extension/ management of Government schemes, programmes or missions; DPR preparation and consultancy in the horticulture sector/ Agriculture sector. Preference will be given to candidates having relevant experience in the Makhana sector.

selection_process: Interview Merit based selection by Selection Committee
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NMB Technical Expert Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NMB Technical Expert post?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of applications for the NMB Technical Expert post is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Technical Expert position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master's Degree in Agriculture or Horticulture with First Division or at least 60% marks. Additionally, a minimum of 5 years of relevant experience is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Technical Expert role?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Technical Expert position is 50 years. Age relaxation is applicable for retired persons as per Central Government rules.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Technical Expert post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Technical Expert post will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 80,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q5. How can I apply for the NMB Technical Expert recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted offline. Candidates need to download the application form, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it via post to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Technical Expert post?
faq.answer: The selection process will primarily involve an interview. A merit-based selection will be conducted by a Selection Committee.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a contractual job opportunity at the National Makhana Board.

faq.question: Q9. Does NMB offer any preference for specific experience?
faq.answer: Yes, preference will be given to candidates who have relevant experience in the Makhana sector, in addition to the general experience requirements.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the links provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
